source: hand-authored per spec 14 FR2 + migrated from ATTR_TO_CSS in pattern-fingerprint.py
schema_notes: Each role describes how to recognise and extract a single semantic concept (e.g. a text colour, a spacing token). extract.py (P4) reads this as its dispatch table: given a (block, attribute) pair, look up the attribute's role, then use selector_strategy + value_extractor to read the live value off the rendered DOM. Cross-platform recipe is the Rosetta Stone mapping for cloning to non-SGS targets.

colour-text.description: A colour applied to text content via the CSS `color` property.

colour-bg.description: A colour applied to an element's background via background-color.
colour-bg.value_extractor_notes: MUST read backgroundColor + backgroundImage + filter + mixBlendMode + parent chain — per rule extend-measurement-set-when-human-eye-disputes.

colour-border.description: A colour applied to an element's border via border-color.

colour-gradient.description: A linear or radial gradient applied as background-image.
colour-gradient.value_extractor_notes: Reads background-image not background-color. Captured as standalone role because gradients sit on the BG-image axis, not the BG-color axis — measurement-extension rule.

cross_platform_recipe.shadcn: Tailwind gradient utilities + custom colour vars

number-css-px.description: An integer CSS length in pixels (border-width, font-size when not token-based, etc).

cross_platform_recipe.tailwind: w-N or h-N (Tailwind spacing scale) or arbitrary [Npx]
cross_platform_recipe.bootstrap: Bootstrap sizing utilities (w-25, w-50) — limited to common values

spacing-token.description: A spacing value from theme.json spacingSizes (e.g. var:preset|spacing|40).
spacing-token.value_extractor_notes: Live DOM holds the resolved px; reverse-map to nearest theme.json token when serialising back to SGS.

cross_platform_recipe.tailwind: p-N m-N gap-N (Tailwind scale) or arbitrary [Npx]

shadow-preset.description: A box-shadow value from theme.json shadow presets.

font-family-preset.description: A font-family value from theme.json typography.fontFamilies.

cross_platform_recipe.bootstrap: font-monospace (limited utility set; usually CSS variables)

font-size-preset.description: A font-size from theme.json typography.fontSizes (e.g. medium, large, x-large).

cross_platform_recipe.tailwind: text-sm text-base text-lg text-xl text-2xl text-3xl

border-radius-token.description: A border-radius value, often from theme.json custom.borderRadius tokens.

transition-preset.description: A CSS transition duration + easing token.

cross_platform_recipe.bootstrap: (no built-in transition utilities; use CSS variables)

image-object.description: An image attachment (id + url + alt + width + height + sizes).
image-object.value_extractor_notes: Reads , , . Source attribute typically named image, mediaUrl, etc.

cross_platform_recipe.shadcn: or Next.js with fill / sizes props

link-href.description: A URL associated with a link element.

text-content.description: Plain text inside an element. Reads textContent, not innerHTML.

cross_platform_recipe.sgs: PlainText / TextControl -> attribute -> render.php echoes via esc_html()

richtext-content.description: Rich text (HTML allowed) inside an element. May contain strong, anchor, em, etc. tags.
richtext-content.value_extractor_notes: Reads innerHTML; allowed tags constrained by wp_kses() on the WP side. When rehydrating in React-generic targets, run through a sanitiser (DOMPurify) before any client-side render-as-HTML path.

cross_platform_recipe.sgs: RichText component -> attribute -> render.php echoes via wp_kses_post()
cross_platform_recipe.shadcn: Sanitise html via DOMPurify -> render as React node
cross_platform_recipe.react_generic: Sanitise html via DOMPurify before rendering

enum-class-probe.description: An attribute that controls the presence of one class out of a fixed enum (e.g. layout=grid|list|masonry -> class is-grid|is-list|is-masonry).
enum-class-probe.value_extractor_notes: Probe the element's classList for any of the known modifier classes; map class -> enum value.

cross_platform_recipe.sgs: SelectControl -> attribute -> render.php adds is-<value> class
cross_platform_recipe.tailwind: Conditional classes via clsx() / template literal

boolean-visibility.description: A boolean attribute controlling whether an element exists in the DOM.
boolean-visibility.value_extractor_notes: Probe with querySelector — element present == true; absent == false. Distinct from display:none which is a CSS-level hide.

cross_platform_recipe.sgs: ToggleControl -> attribute -> render.php gates output with if ($attr)

select-from-enum.description: Same as enum-class-probe but the value is materialised as a data-attribute, not a class.
select-from-enum.value_extractor_notes: Probe element.dataset['<name>']. Used when the value drives JS behaviour rather than CSS.

query-descriptor.description: A structured query — typically for post-grid / query-loop blocks (post type, taxonomy, limit, orderby).
query-descriptor.value_extractor_notes: Reads server-side query attributes (postType, postsPerPage, taxQuery) from the rendered list; reverse-engineers by inspecting <article class="post-id-N type-Y term-Z"> markers.

cross_platform_recipe.tailwind: Server-rendered or fetched via API + map() in React
